insilico.note: PVS1-class null variant; in-silico missense scores not applicable

literature.title: The carrier frequency of the BRCA1 185delAG mutation is approximately 1 percent in Ashkenazi Jewish individuals.
literature.abstract: Struewing et al. report 185delAG (c.68_69delAG) as a founder pathogenic frameshift in Ashkenazi Jewish populations with elevated breast/ovarian cancer risk.
